chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 622 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of post-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of post-arrest bail 25.08.2025 M/s Zafar Ali Shah and Athar Hussain Abro, Advocates for applicant. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- As to the notices issued to the legal heir (mother) of the deceased on the earlier dates, the husband was served, and notices were ordered to be repeated. The repeated notices were accordingly attempted to be complied with, and statements of two persons were recorded in this regard. However, it is stated that the mother has gone to Karachi. Learned Counsel, after arguing the matter at some length, requires that appropriate directions may be issued to the learned trial Court for expeditious proceedings. Learned Deputy Prosecutor General does not oppose the request so made. Accordingly, this bail application stands disposed of, with direction to the learned trial Court to proceed with the case and conclude the same within a period of three months hereof. J U D G E Abdul Basit
